section-metric1-info.title: Changes will activate on the next API update interval.

section-metric2-info.title: Changes will activate on the next API update interval.

section-metric3-info.title: Changes will activate on the next API update interval.

section-general-info.title: Changes will activate on the next API update interval.

update-interval-seconds.name: Update Interval
update-interval-seconds.description: How often prices are fetched from CoinGecko.

metric1-color-arrow-only.name: Color the Arrow Only
metric1-color-arrow-only.description: If active, the price text remains white.

metric2-color-arrow-only.name: Color the Arrow Only
metric2-color-arrow-only.description: If active, the price text remains white.

metric3-color-arrow-only.name: Color the Arrow Only
metric3-color-arrow-only.description: If active, the price text remains white.

metric1-show-symbol.name: Show Currency Symbol (e.g. $ or €)
metric1-show-symbol.description: Replaces the currency code with the symbol.

metric2-show-symbol.name: Show Currency Symbol (e.g. $ or €)
metric2-show-symbol.description: Replaces the currency code with the symbol.

metric3-show-symbol.name: Show Currency Symbol (e.g. $ or €)
metric3-show-symbol.description: Replaces the currency code with the symbol.

metric1-enabled.name: Enabled
metric1-enabled.description: Toggles the display of this metric on/off.

metric1-id.name: Currency ID (CoinGecko)
metric1-id.description: Select the cryptocurrency from the top list.
metric1-id.tooltip: The value in brackets (e.g. BTC) is the default symbol displayed on the panel.

metric1-custom-id.name: Custom Currency ID
metric1-custom-id.tooltip: Enter the exact CoinGecko ID. This field overrides the dropdown selection and is preferred for unlisted coins.

metric1-currency.name: Comparison Currency
metric1-currency.description: Select the currency for the price comparison.
metric1-currency.tooltip: The API call uses the code in brackets (e.g. USD).

metric1-symbol.name: Display Symbol
metric1-symbol.description: The symbol displayed on the panel (e.g. BTC).

metric1-color-up.name: Color for Rising Price (▲)
metric1-color-up.description: Select the color for positive price movement.

metric1-color-down.name: Color for Falling Price (▼)
metric1-color-down.description: Select the color for negative price movement.

metric2-color-up.description: Select the color for positive price movement.

metric2-color-down.name: Color for Falling Price (▼)
metric2-color-down.description: Select the color for negative price movement.
